description: Sandbox driver picked at submit time. Echoed onto the `BacktestJob.sandboxDriver` column. The orchestrator reads this to pick the implementation behind the `Sandbox` trait (Phase 1).

oneOf.description: Local Docker daemon. Useful for CI + dev loops.
Daytona cloud sandboxes. Default for production.
In-process echo sandbox; powers CLI smoke tests + unit tests without container infra.

title: SandboxDriver
